name: Clay Higgins
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $26,846 for Clay Higgins in U.S. House, LA-03. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
